issue.title: Broad repo Python reduction sweep AM

commands: find reports bigclaw-go/docs/reports bigclaw-go/internal/regression scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-247 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state across the densest residual evidence surfaces plus root operator scripts.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `e7e18ff0`.

An initial push was rejected after `origin/main` advanced to `1858cdb1`; the lane was rebased, the shared `.symphony/workpad.md` conflict was resolved in favor of the newer upstream workpad, and the final pushed head is `62626d62 BIG-GO-247 refresh final validation timings`.
